items.name: Discover
items.text: We learn about your business, users, systems, goals, and constraints.

items.name: Define
items.text: We shape the opportunity into a clear roadmap, scope, technical direction, and delivery plan.

items.name: Design
items.text: We create user flows, architecture, prototypes, and experience details before heavy development begins.

items.name: Build
items.text: We develop, integrate, test, and refine the solution with transparent progress along the way.

items.name: Launch & Improve
items.text: We support deployment, monitor performance, and identify opportunities for future optimization.
